title: Self board connect
excerpt: Can we create a self connect board once item is created.

posts.author: PrachiN (PrachiN)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we create a self connect board once item is created.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, you should be able to set this up via the item default values feature!

Just have a connect boards column already existing on your board and then in the item default values settings, you can enter the board/item you want every new item to be connected to.

I hope this helps!
